tagline: Uncover local challenges, team up, make an impact.

designSystem.style: Editorial magazine — asymmetric grid layouts, bold italic serif headings, thick accent rules, sparse whitespace with high-contrast typographic hierarchy. Deep forest green surfaces with burnt orange accents on warm off-white text. Concrete grey for muted UI elements.

screenDescriptions.home: Today's quest feed — asymmetric editorial header with italic serif title, filter pills, featured guild mission card in forest green, and scrollable solo quest list with category tags and XP indicators
screenDescriptions.explore: Proximity map view with tap-to-select quest pins, distance list, and selected quest detail card. Simulated grid-overlay street map for Riverside District.
screenDescriptions.guild: Guild dashboard with member avatar strip, tabbed missions/leaderboard/chat. Mission progress bars, XP leaderboard, and guild chat with reply input.
screenDescriptions.impact: Impact ledger with monthly progress bar, 2×2 asymmetric stats grid, recent impact timeline, and achievement badges with locked/unlocked states.
screenDescriptions.profile: User profile with green hero section, multi-segment skill scroll bars, AI-adaptive next-step suggestions, and settings list.
